summary: A one-page headline summary followed by a detailed scenario-by-scenario breakdown of every pound Dean Harrison could personally earn from the Wincham litigation project. Covers four commercial monetisation tracks (Data Licence, CPA/Lead Gen, Marketing Retainer + CPA, and full CMC/Revenue Share), Philip Harrison's anchor case settlement as a separate personal asset, and realistic timeline projections for each route. Includes a consolidated earnings table across Conservative, Base Case, and Maximum scenarios.
